meaning: adj.富有的,丰裕的,充分的n.富人,有钱人
examples: They live in a wealthy suburb of Chicago.
It had once been the home of a wealthy nobleman.
All of them came from wealthy, upper class families.
Soros, on the other hand, manages a huge offshore hedge fund for wealthy individuals and institutions.
This annual gathering of wealthy technology entrepreneurs has made a video, shot, and edited in a day.
